category_sources: Official Carvel kapp documentation describes kapp as a CLI for managing Kubernetes applications and bulk resources.
source_facts.description says kapp is a CLI tool for Kubernetes users to group and manage bulk resources.
display_name_sources: Official Carvel documentation styles the project name as kapp.
docs_sources: Official Carvel site provides dedicated kapp documentation.
Official GitHub README is an additional official project source.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/carvel-dev/kapp, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official Carvel kapp page describes deploying and viewing groups of Kubernetes resources as applications.
source_facts.description mentions Kubernetes resource grouping and management.
